mapper.sql: alevel_source_bundle_id, alevel_import_batch_id, alevel_paper_id, bundle_code, bundle_name, exam_board, qualification, subject_code, subject_name, unit_code, unit_name, exam_session, session_code, source_name, file_count, has_question_paper, has_mark_scheme, has_insert, has_exam_report, bundle_status, detection_json, warning_json, error_message, import_version, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alevel_source_bundle WHERE alevel_source_bundle_id = #{bundleId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM alevel_source_bundle WHERE bundle_code = #{bundleCode} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM alevel_source_bundle WHERE alevel_import_batch_id = #{batchId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY create_time ASC, alevel_source_bundle_id ASC
SELECT FROM alevel_source_bundle WHERE alevel_paper_id = #{paperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY create_time ASC, alevel_source_bundle_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alevel_source_bundle ( alevel_import_batch_id, alevel_paper_id, bundle_code, bundle_name, exam_board, qualification, subject_code, subject_name, unit_code, unit_name, exam_session, session_code, source_name, file_count, has_question_paper, has_mark_scheme, has_insert, has_exam_report, bundle_status, detection_json, warning_json, error_message, import_version, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{alevelImportBatchId}, #{alevelPaperId}, #{bundleCode}, #{bundleName}, #{examBoard}, #{qualification}, #{subjectCode}, #{subjectName}, #{unitCode}, #{unitName}, #{examSession}, #{sessionCode}, #{sourceName}, #{fileCount}, #{hasQuestionPaper}, #{hasMarkScheme}, #{hasInsert}, #{hasExamReport}, #{bundleStatus}, #{detectionJson}, #{warningJson}, #{errorMessage}, #{importVersion}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleteFlag} )
mapper.update: UPDATE alevel_source_bundle SET alevel_import_batch_id = #{alevelImportBatchId}, alevel_paper_id = #{alevelPaperId}, bundle_name = #{bundleName}, exam_board = #{examBoard}, qualification = #{qualification}, subject_code = #{subjectCode}, subject_name = #{subjectName}, unit_code = #{unitCode}, unit_name = #{unitName}, exam_session = #{examSession}, session_code = #{sessionCode}, source_name = #{sourceName}, file_count = #{fileCount}, has_question_paper = #{hasQuestionPaper}, has_mark_scheme = #{hasMarkScheme}, has_insert = #{hasInsert}, has_exam_report = #{hasExamReport}, bundle_status = #{bundleStatus}, detection_json = #{detectionJson}, warning_json = #{warningJson}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, import_version = #{importVersion}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE alevel_source_bundle_id = #{alevelSourceBundleId}

UPDATE alevel_source_bundle b SET file_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alevel_source_bundle_file f WHERE f.alevel_source_bundle_id = #{bundleId} AND f.status = 1 AND f.delete_flag = '1' ), has_question_paper = CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM alevel_source_bundle_file f WHERE f.alevel_source_bundle_id = #{bundleId} AND f.file_role = 'QUESTION_PAPER' AND f.status = 1 AND f.delete_flag = '1' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, has_mark_scheme = CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM alevel_source_bundle_file f WHERE f.alevel_source_bundle_id = #{bundleId} AND f.file_role = 'MARK_SCHEME' AND f.status = 1 AND f.delete_flag = '1' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, has_insert = CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM alevel_source_bundle_file f WHERE f.alevel_source_bundle_id = #{bundleId} AND f.file_role = 'INSERT' AND f.status = 1 AND f.delete_flag = '1' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, has_exam_report = CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM alevel_source_bundle_file f WHERE f.alevel_source_bundle_id = #{bundleId} AND f.file_role = 'EXAM_REPORT' AND f.status = 1 AND f.delete_flag = '1' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, bundle_status = CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM alevel_source_bundle_file f WHERE f.alevel_source_bundle_id = #{bundleId} AND f.file_role = 'QUESTION_PAPER' AND f.status = 1 AND f.delete_flag = '1' ) THEN 'READY' ELSE 'PENDING' END, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE b.alevel_source_bundle_id = #{bundleId} AND b.status = 1 AND b.delete_flag = '1'
